item.title: It’s on Final dates added Playing with full live band consisting of the Berlin b...
item.description:
@annika.henderson

It’s on
Final dates added
Playing with full live band consisting of the Berlin boyband: @nochteff @adriano.redoglia @namesloz

Come vent, dance, resist, engage, organise yourselves, love, live, protect each other - music is a gift. Spaces of music are a gift. So many are run purely out of passion. Support grassroots, support the real. Come out of the cocoons, we are knocking.

❤️❤️❤️❤️

Special thanks to @sacredbones @powerlineagency @invadarecords @stonesthrow @chetthebody for their support, for giving a platform to artists, for staying true, for giving freedom and never making me compromise.

Also big up all the promoters, the venues, the sound engineers, the lighting people, the bar staff, the pr who help this machine run.

And to all of you for showing up and putting your masses where your mouth is

Big up. Big love

❤️

Poster by @aled.simons
Image by @fastfoodculture
item.content:encoded:
@annika.henderson

It’s on
Final dates added
Playing with full live band consisting of the Berlin boyband: @nochteff @adriano.redoglia @namesloz

Come vent, dance, resist, engage, organise yourselves, love, live, protect each other - music is a gift. Spaces of music are a gift. So many are run purely out of passion. Support grassroots, support the real. Come out of the cocoons, we are knocking.

❤️❤️❤️❤️

Special thanks to @sacredbones @powerlineagency @invadarecords @stonesthrow @chetthebody for their support, for giving a platform to artists, for staying true, for giving freedom and never making me compromise.

Also big up all the promoters, the venues, the sound engineers, the lighting people, the bar staff, the pr who help this machine run.

And to all of you for showing up and putting your masses where your mouth is

Big up. Big love

❤️

Poster by @aled.simons
Image by @fastfoodculture
item.author: annika.henderson

item.title: It’s been a blast, seriously. We danced, we cried, we moshed, we laughed, we lov...
item.description:
@annika.henderson

It’s been a blast, seriously.
We danced, we cried, we moshed, we laughed, we loved.
Final leg of the tour, heading down south. Met so many nice people along the way, strong people, caring people, who want different from what is going on right now. Keep fighting, spread the love.
Come join us for these (ticket links on anika-music.com)

Playing live with @thulinmartin @avishag__rodrigues

Oct 05, 2025 Washington, DC Comet Ping Pong w/ Avishag Cohen Rodrigues as support @cometpingpong  
Oct 06, 2025 Chapel Hill, NC Local 506 @local506
 Oct 08, 2025 Atlanta, GA The EARL @badearl
 Oct 09, 2025 New Orleans, LA Gasa Gasa @gasa_gasa  
Oct 10, 2025 Memphis, TN B-Side @bsidememphis
 Oct 11, 2025 Dallas, TX Rubber Gloves @rgrsdentontx  
Oct 12, 2025 Austin, TX The Ballroom @29thstreetballroom

☮️🌹🖤❤️‍🔥

@heavy_trip @sacredbones @stonesthrow @invadarecords

Picture by @nimachaichi

Exclusive on tour - limited merch left - sexy design by @mollystyslinger we only have a few large size left, better be quick
item.content:encoded:
@annika.henderson

It’s been a blast, seriously.
We danced, we cried, we moshed, we laughed, we loved.
Final leg of the tour, heading down south. Met so many nice people along the way, strong people, caring people, who want different from what is going on right now. Keep fighting, spread the love.
Come join us for these (ticket links on anika-music.com)

Playing live with @thulinmartin @avishag__rodrigues

Oct 05, 2025 Washington, DC Comet Ping Pong w/ Avishag Cohen Rodrigues as support @cometpingpong  
Oct 06, 2025 Chapel Hill, NC Local 506 @local506
 Oct 08, 2025 Atlanta, GA The EARL @badearl
 Oct 09, 2025 New Orleans, LA Gasa Gasa @gasa_gasa  
Oct 10, 2025 Memphis, TN B-Side @bsidememphis
 Oct 11, 2025 Dallas, TX Rubber Gloves @rgrsdentontx  
Oct 12, 2025 Austin, TX The Ballroom @29thstreetballroom

☮️🌹🖤❤️‍🔥

@heavy_trip @sacredbones @stonesthrow @invadarecords

Picture by @nimachaichi

Exclusive on tour - limited merch left - sexy design by @mollystyslinger we only have a few large size left, better be quick
item.author: annika.henderson

item.title: It’s happening We leave for tour tomorrow. Volksbühne was amazing- thanks to eve...
item.description:
@annika.henderson

It’s happening
We leave for tour tomorrow. Volksbühne was amazing- thanks to everyone who helped make that happen. Next up Köln
See you there. Come sweat with us.
Dates here. Still some tickets left, so be quick! See you front row

🇩🇪24.04.2025 - Anika Live @ Bumann & Sohn Köln, DE @copopfestival
🇫🇷25.04.2025 - Anika Live @ Le Grand Mix, Tourcoing, FR @legrandmix
🇧🇪27.04.2025 - Anika Live @ AB (club) Brussels, BE @abconcerts
🇬🇧28.04.2025 - Anika Live @ OMEARA London, UK @omearalondon
🇬🇧29.04.2025 - Anika Live @ Strange Brew Bristol, UK @strange_brew_briz
🇬🇧30.04.2025 - Anika Live @ YES (The Pink Room) Manchester, UK @yes_mcr
🇬🇧01.05.2025 - Anika Live @ The Brudenell Social Club Leeds, UK @nath_brudenell
🇬🇧02.05.2025 - Anika Live @ Ulster Sports Club Belfast, UK @ulstersportsclub
🇮🇪03.05.2025 - Anika Live @ Whelans, Dublin, IRE @whelanslive
🇬🇧05.05.2025 - Anika Live @ DUST Brighton and Hove, UK @dust_venue
🇫🇷06.05.2025 - Anika Live @ Gonzai Night @ Petit Bain Paris, FR @petitbain @gonzai_magazine
🇫🇷07.05.2025 - Anika Live @ La Grenze Strasbourg, FR
🇨🇭08.05.2025 - Anika Live @ Bad Bonn Düdingen, CH @badbonnkilbi @bad_bonn
🇨🇭09.05.2025 - Anika Live @ Bogen F Zürich, CH @bogenf
🇩🇪10.05.2025 - Anika Live @ Mousonturm, Frankfurt am Main, DE @mousonturm

Live onstage with @namesloz @thulin.martin @nochteff
Sound @hellohellosound

Photo credit: @adriano.redoglia

Art direction and visuals by @zeyblade_
Lights by @grinderteeth Styling by @dannymusterworks @vava.dudu
🖤🖤🌹🥛

It’s happening
We leave for tour tomorrow. Volksbühne was amazing- thanks to everyone who helped make that happen. Next up Köln
